title: clidemia capitellata var. neglecta
intro: Clidemia capitellata var. neglecta, also known as 'Mountain Muhelya', is a plant species that belongs to the family Melastomataceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Clidemia capitellata var. neglecta include its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
